title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: ```diff --- .codex/prompts/kernel.md +++ .codex/prompts/kernel.md @@ -Continue with normal repository analysis. +On `/kernel`, bootstrap first. Do not do repository-doc exploration first. +Forbidden before bootstrap: reading `README.md`, `CODEX.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `docs/**`, `.fugue/**` unless explicitly requested by user. @@ -Procedure: +Procedure (hard order): +1. Parse `$ARGUMENTS`. +2. Immediately start multi-agent bootstrap (no pre-read phase). +3. Start at least 6 materially distinct lanes within 45s: + - `orchestrator-main` + - `implementer` + - `reviewer` + - `security-critic` + - `verification` + - `monitor` +4. Return acknowledgement immediately after bootstrap with exact lines: + - `Kernel orchestration is active.` + - `Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6).` + - `Lane manifest:` +5. Only after step 4, perform repo inspection or task-specific work. @@ -If smoke mode is active: +If smoke mode is active (`SMOKE_RESULT_MARKER=<token>`): + - skip exploratory work + - run `env -u RUN_CODEX_KERNEL_SMOKE bash tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh` + - print `Smoke verification: PASS` only on success + - print `Smoke result marker: <token>` with exact token @@ -Constraints: +Constraints: + - Treat any pre-bootstrap exploration as policy violation. + - Do not ask for confirmation to start bootstrap. + - If 6 lanes cannot be live within 45s, fail closed with: + `bootstrap_failed: insufficient_active_lanes` + - Do not continue in single-lane mode. ``` ```diff --- .codex/prompts/k.md +++ .codex/prompts/k.md @@ -Treat `/k` as alias. +Treat `/k` as strict alias of `/kernel` with identical bootstrap-first rules and constraints. ```
